member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppArrayInnerIndexer
member.summary: Access to inner array indexer

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppArrayInnerIndexer.ArrayNames
member.summary: Array names

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppArrayInnerIndexer.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Create arrays inside the function body on stack

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppArrayOnStack
member.summary: Create arrays inside the function body on stack

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppArrayOnStack.ArrayNames
member.summary: Array names

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppArrayOnStack.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Create arrays inside the function body on stack

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppConstRefReturnTypeAttribute
member.summary: Enforces property getter result type to be const reference. Avoids extra copying operations.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppConstRefReturnTypeAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Enforces property getter result type to be constreference in translated code.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppDeclareFriendFunctionAttribute
member.summary: Forces friend function declaration. Forward declaration for mentioned function is generated.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppDeclareFriendFunctionAttribute.FunctionDeclaration
member.summary: Name of the friend function as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppDeclareFriendFunctionAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Generates friend declaration for specified function.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppDisableEnumeratorCurrentValueHolderAttribute
member.summary:
This attribute is applicable to the enumerator class or struct, when emit_enumerator_current_value_holder global option is on, but you're need to keep get_Current code free from holder emission (supposed, you know what you do).
This attribute enforces translator to avoid special holder usage in get_Current method, in spite of emit_enumerator_current_value_holder is ON.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppDisableVirtualFunctionCallsWarning
member.summary: Disables warning logging about virtual function call for marked class method/property/indexer.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppAddStructDefaultMethodsAttribute
member.summary: Forces generating default ValueType methods: operator==, Equals, ToString and GetHashCode. See https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.valuetype?view=netframework-4.7.1 for details.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppAllowBoxingAttribute
member.summary: Allows boxing for this type. This requires the type to implement operator == (), ToString() const and GetHashCode() const.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppAllowStackAllocation
member.summary: Allows translated classes to be allocated on stack by making their destructors public.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.ArgumentKind
member.summary: Argument translating mode. Used by CppArgumentKindAttribute.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.ArgumentKind.Value
member.summary: Value-type argument translation, same as if no CppArgumentKind attribute was used.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.ArgumentKind.Reference
member.summary: Reference function argument.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.ArgumentKind.Pointer
member.summary: Pointer function argument.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.ArgumentKind.ConstValue
member.summary: Const value function argument.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.ArgumentKind.ConstReference
member.summary: Const reference function argument.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.ArgumentKind.ConstPointer
member.summary: Const pointer function argument.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.ArgumentKind.UnsafeConst
member.summary: Unsafe pointer to const data (for arrays).

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.ArgumentKind.ArrayView
member.summary: Array view

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppArgumentKindAttribute
member.summary: Forces to use a specific way to pass a parameter to function (const reference, pointer, etc.). This option is useful mostly if you're overriding your translated code with manually written one, as it only affects function formal parameters but not the references to them. Calling contexts are not affected as well. Please note that C# semantics is followed by default which means that pointer types are passed to functions by reference while value types are passed by value. You don't need to use this attribute to impose this behavior.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppArgumentKindAttribute.Kind
member.summary: Argument kind as sent when adding the attribute to argument.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppArgumentKindAttribute.#ctor(CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.ArgumentKind)
member.summary: Defines way of translating argument to C++.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppConstexpr
member.summary: Forces translation of a field or of all fields of class as constexpr.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppConstMethodAttribute
member.summary: Mark method as const in C++.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppConstMethodAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Places const modifier to the method when it is translated.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppNonConstMethodAttribute
member.summary: Mark method as non-const in C++.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppNonConstMethodAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Mark method as non-const in C++. Translator config setting will be overridden

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppConstWrapperAttribute
member.summary: generate const method wrapper for non const method

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppConstWrapperAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: generate const method wrapper for non const method

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppConstRefParamAttribute
member.summary: Forces const reference form of function parameters in translated code. Same effect can be achieved using CppArgumentKind(ArgumentKind.ConstReference) attribute, but CppConstRefParam form is more compact. This parameter can be used e. g. to reduce shared pointer copying performance penalties.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppConstRefParamAttribute.Names
member.summary: Argument names as set in attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppConstRefParamAttribute.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Forces arguments with specified names to be translated as const references.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppCTORSelfReferenceAttribute
member.summary: Generate guard which allows it to safely create temporary shared pointers during constructor execution without deleting the object. Not required if auto_ctor_self_reference option is enabled. Otherwise, creating shared pointers in constructor could lead to calling 'delete' on object being constructed and crashes in runtime.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppDeclareFriendClassAttribute
member.summary: Forces friend class declaration. Forward declaration for mentioned class is generated if needed.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppDeclareFriendClassAttribute.FullTypeName
member.summary: Name of the friend class as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppDeclareFriendClassAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Generates friend declaration for specified typename.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppDeferredInitAttribute
member.summary: Moves actual C# initialization routines (static members construction, static constructors calls) from C++ static variables initialization phase (default) to the first reference to the members. As result, all static data members in class become singletons.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppDeferredInitAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Makes class initialization lazy (on first access to class members). The argument is ignored by translator.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppDisableAutoReorderingAttribute
member.summary: Disables class members automatic reordering.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppEmitEnumeratorCurrentValueHolderAttribute
member.summary:
This attribute is applicable to the enumerator class or struct, when emit_enumerator_current_value_holder global option is off, and you're need to avoid С4172 compiler error or any other errors (null-reference exception, SEH, any type of UB at runtime)
This attribute enforces translator to emit special holder to get_Current method, and store reference to it's result, if necessary.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppNoBeginEndMethodsAttribute
member.summary: Prevents translator from generating begin/end methods

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppDoNotObfuscateAttribute
member.summary: Disables obfuscating the specified entity, even if 'obfuscate_cpp_headers' option is enabled.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppEnumEnableMetadataAttribute
member.summary: Forces metadata generation for enum (string representation of values for parsing and serializing). Use if you need conversions between enum values and strings in translated application. 'cpp_enum_enable_metadata' option enables this behavior globally.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppEnumWithOperatorsAttribute
member.summary: Enables bitwise operators for enum. Use if you are using them.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppExactArrayInitializerAttribute
member.summary: Passes array initializer expression directly from C# to C++ without parsing and code generation. Speeds up translating long initializers (like thousands of string elements, etc.).

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceArrayInitializerCast
member.summary: Forces explicit casts of array initializers otherwise not working in C++ but allowed in C#.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceDynamicCastToTypeParam
member.summary: Forces dynamic casts from Object to argument type parameter instead of static casts used by default.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceDynamicCastToTypeParam.Name
member.summary: Name of affected type parameter as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceDynamicCastToTypeParam.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Forces dynamic casts from Object to the type argument specified as attribute constructor argument.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceDynamicCastFromTypeParam
member.summary: Forces dynamic casts from argument type parameter to Object instead of static casts used by default.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceDynamicCastFromTypeParam.Name
member.summary: Name of affected type parameter as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceDynamicCastFromTypeParam.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Forces dynamic casts to Object from the type argument specified as attribute constructor argument.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceForwardDeclaration
member.summary: Inside attributed type, always use forward declaration of argument type instead of include. Useful for loop type references management, etc.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceForwardDeclaration.FullClassName
member.summary: Full type name to forward declare, as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceForwardDeclaration.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Forces forward declaration of specified type.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceInclude
member.summary: Inside attributed type, always include header with argument type definition instead of forward declaration.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceInclude.FullClassName
member.summary: Full type name to generate include for, as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceInclude.IsIgnoreCrossIncludeCheck
member.summary: Whether attribute ignores cross-include check, as passed to constructor.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceInclude.IsDirectInclude
member.summary: Whether only affects direct includes, as passed to constructor. Support for this value will be removed soon.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceInclude.#ctor(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Forces inclusion of specified type.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceObfuscateAttribute
member.summary: Forces attributed entity to be obfuscated if 'obfuscate_cpp_headers' option is enabled.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceSharedApiAttribute
member.summary: Adds LIBRARY_NAME_SHARED_API keyword to the entity declaration

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppForceStringParam
member.summary: Forces 'String(...)' wrappers around string literals passed to attributed parameter. Useful if there is a problem with overloads (in C++, the priority converting string literals to boolean value is higher than to String class object.+ In C++, these calls are resolved used different rules from C#. Only use if issues occur after translating as translator automatically resolves most such problems.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppGenerateBeginEndMethodsAttribute
member.summary: Forces translator to generate begin/end methods that will delegate begin/end methods of a field or an auto-property

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppGenerateBeginEndMethodsAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Forces translator to generate begin/end methods that will delegate begin/end methods of a field or an auto-property

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIgnoreBaseTypeAttribute
member.summary: Forces translator to omit inheritance from a specific type during translation. One usecase is creating a lightweight class not related to Object tree.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIgnoreBaseTypeAttribute.TypeName
member.summary: Name of base type to ignore, same as passed to attribute constructor. Empty string means System.Object.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIgnoreBaseTypeAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Skip inheritance from System.Object.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIgnoreBaseTypeAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Skip inheritance from specific type.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIgnoreConstraintsAttribute
member.summary: Disables translating 'where' clauses to C++.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIgnoreConstraintsAttribute.Message
member.summary: Comment as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIgnoreConstraintsAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Ignores all constraints without any message.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIgnoreConstraintsAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Ignores all constraints. String comment can be passed which is ignored by translator.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppInlineAttribute
member.summary: Moves methods implementation to header file. If applied to class or struct, all methods become inline.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.IOStreamType
member.summary: Translated stream type. Used by CppIOStreamWrapperAttribute.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.IOStreamType.IStream
member.summary: Stream type. Allows generate overloads to std::istream-like streams.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.IOStreamType.OStream
member.summary: Stream type. Allows generate overloads to std::ostream-like streams.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.IOStreamType.IOStream
member.summary: Stream type. Allows generate overloads to std::iostream-like streams.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIOStreamWrapperAttribute
member.summary: Forces translator to generate overloads for std::iostream-like streams. This option is useful if you need to use std::iostream-like parameter/properties/indexers instead System::IO::Stream-like one.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIOStreamWrapperAttribute.Type
member.summary: Stream type to be sent when adding the attribute to the argument.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIOStreamWrapperAttribute.CharTypeName
member.summary: Stream character's template type name to be sent when adding an attribute to an argument.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIOStreamWrapperAttribute.TraitsTypeName
member.summary: Stream character's traits template type name that can be optionaly sent when adding an attribute to an argument.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIOStreamWrapperAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Constructs CppIOStreamWrapperAttribute object.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIOStreamWrapperAttribute.#ctor(CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.IOStreamType)
member.summary: Constructs CppIOStreamWrapperAttribute object.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppIOStreamWrapperAttribute.#ctor(CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.IOStreamType,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Constructs CppIOStreamWrapperAttribute object.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppLambdaPassByReferenceAttribute
member.summary: Mark local variable to be passed to lambda-function by reference, not by value.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppLambdaPassByReferenceAttribute.VariableName
member.summary: Variable name, as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppLambdaPassByReferenceAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Makes specified variable to be captured by reference by lambdas in attributed method.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppLambdaUseHolderAttribute
member.summary: Mark a local variable to be wrapper into a holder.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppLambdaUseHolderAttribute.VariableName
member.summary: Variable name, as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppLambdaUseHolderAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Makes specified variable to be captured by value by lambdas in attributed method.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppLambdaPassByValueAttribute
member.summary: Mark local variable to be passed to lambda-function by value, not by reference.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppLambdaPassByValueAttribute.VariableName
member.summary: Variable name, as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppLambdaPassByValueAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Makes specified variable to be captured by value by lambdas in attributed method.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppLambdaShouldCaptureByReferenceAttribute
member.summary: Lambda that is passed as an argument should capture all variables by reference if possible.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppMakeMembersPublicAttribute
member.summary: Make all class/struct members public.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppMutable
member.summary: Marks field as mutable.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppNightTestAttribute
member.summary: Marks test as night, excluding it from usual test runs by adding 'ASPOSE_ENABLE_NIGHT_TESTS' ifdefs around it. Use on test method or test fixture class or outer class.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppNoAbstract
member.summary: Make translator not generate ABSTRACT modifier.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.AccessModifiers
member.summary: Overridden access modifier of the entity.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.AccessModifiers.Public
member.summary: Makes the entry public.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.AccessModifiers.Internal
member.summary: Makes the entry internal.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.AccessModifiers.Protected
member.summary: Makes the entry protected.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.AccessModifiers.Private
member.summary: Makes the entry private.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppOverrideAccessModifier
member.summary: Overrides access modifier of the entity.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppOverrideAccessModifier.#ctor(CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.AccessModifiers)
member.summary: Overrides access modifier of the entity.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppOverrideAccessModifier.AccessModifier
member.summary: New access modifier.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppOverrideAttribute
member.summary: add override modifier to the method in C++. if attribute is applied to class then class methods that have 'override' in C# will receive 'override' in C++

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppOverrideAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: add override modifier to the methods in C++.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppOverrideTestFixtureSetUpAttribute
member.summary: Marks the method as override TestFixtureSetUp method. Automatically changes name and adds 'static' modifier. For all used class variables the 'static' modifier is added.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppOverrideTestFixtureTearDownAttribute
member.summary: Marks the method as override TestFixtureTearDown method. Automatically changes name and adds 'static' modifier. For all used class variables the 'static' modifier is added.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppPlaceAfterAttribute
member.summary: Places entity (class, struct, etc.) after the specified anchor entity.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppPlaceAfterAttribute.EntityName
member.summary: Anchor entity name.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppPlaceAfterAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Places entity (class, struct, etc.) after the specified anchor entity.
member.param: Anchor entity name (don't use fully qualified name).

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppPlaceBeforeAttribute
member.summary: Places entity (class, struct, etc.) before the specified anchor entity.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppPlaceBeforeAttribute.EntityName
member.summary: Anchor entity name.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppPlaceBeforeAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Places entity (class, struct, etc.) before the specified anchor entity.
member.param: Anchor entity name (don't use fully qualified name).

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppPortAsEnumAttribute
member.summary: Translate numeric constant as enum (not enum class) with single value in it. Useful to define header-only constants (const fields are translated as static constants and require definition as an addition to header declaration.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppPortAsSingletonAttribute
member.summary: Translates field as singleton.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppPortAsSingletonAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Translates field as singleton.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppPortAsSingletonAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Translates field as singleton. Obsolete argument is ignored.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppPortConstStringAsWCharAttribute
member.summary: Forces translating "const string m_field ..." as "const wchar_t *m_field ..." instead of "System::String m_field ...".

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppRenameEntity
member.summary: Renames method or property in output code. Useful if you have name clash which can't be resolved on C++ side (e. g. two virtual methods with same signatures or C++ keyword used as an identifier). Affects both symbol and references to it.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppRenameEntity.Name
member.summary: New entity's name, as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppRenameEntity.#ctor
member.summary: Renames entity using translator-generated new name.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppRenameEntity.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Renames entity using specified new name.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppSelfReferenceAttribute
member.summary: Same as CppCTORSelfReference, but works on method. No auto-placement option at the moment exists for this attribute. Useful if method is called when no references to object exist (e. g. during construction or destruction).

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppSkipDefinitionAttribute
member.summary: Skips translating method or class definition, leaving declaration in place. Optionally, generates stubs that throw exception without actually doing anything. Use this attribute on methods you want to substitute native C++ implementation to.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppSkipDefinitionAttribute.Stub
member.summary: Whether to generate throwing stub code, as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppSkipDefinitionAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Forces translator to skip translating attributed entity. If argument is set to true, an exception throwing stub will be generated instead of actual method body.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppSkipEntityAttribute
member.summary: Skips class, struct, enum, method, field, etc. The output code looks as if the entity was not present in the input at all. Unlike CppSkipDefinition, skips both declarations and definitions of the affected entities. Note that any references to skipped entity in translated code end up in compilation errors.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppSkipEntityAttribute.Message
member.summary: Message string, as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppSkipEntityAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Makes translator skip entity.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppSkipEntityAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Makes translator skip entity. Optional message is ignored by translator.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppSkipTestAttribute
member.summary: Adds a GTEST_SKIP call at the beginning of the method. Does not apply to non-test methods.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppStaticMethodAttribute
member.summary: Marks the method or property as static. For all class variables used by it the 'static' modifier is added.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppStaticVariableAttribute
member.summary: Forces argument variable as static. Affects all variables with same name. Only affects declarations containing single variable per declaration. Useful to cache large objects (e. g. string arrays, etc.).

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppStaticVariableAttribute.VariableName
member.summary: Variable name, as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppStaticVariableAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Forces named variable to be translated as static one.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUnknownTypeParam
member.summary: Mark generic class/method type argument as unknown-type (it is needed for using ObjectExt::UnknownToObject & ObjectExt::ObjectToUnknown).

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUnknownTypeParam.Name
member.summary: Type parameter name, as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUnknownTypeParam.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Makes translator add ObjectExt::UnknownToObject & ObjectExt::ObjectToUnknown calls when casting to or from specified type parameter.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUseAlternativeSwitchAttribute
member.summary: Forces using do-while form of switch translation inside this method. Similar to alternative_string_switch option, but only affects single method.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUseReflectionAttribute
member.summary: Enables translator generating full reflection information for specific class.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUseWeakPtrToCaptureThis
member.summary: Use System::WeakPtr to capture this in a lambda expression.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUsingAttribute
member.summary: Generates 'using' directives that import symbols from base classes.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUsingAttribute.Visibility
member.summary: 'Using' directives visibility.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUsingAttribute.Visibility.Public
member.summary: Put 'using' directive into public section of class members.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUsingAttribute.Visibility.Protected
member.summary: Put 'using' directive into protected section of class members.

member.name: F:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUsingAttribute.Visibility.Private
member.summary: Put 'using' directive into private section of class members.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUsingAttribute.MethodName
member.summary: Method name, as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUsingAttribute.MethodVisibility
member.summary: Method visibility, as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUsingAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Generate 'using' directive for specific method in public section.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUsingAttribute.#ctor(System.String,CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppUsingAttribute.Visibility)
member.summary: Generate 'using' directive for specific method in specified section.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppValueTypeParam
member.summary: Mark generic class/method type argument as value-type (don't wrap it to System::SharedPtr, apply boxing rules, etc.).

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppValueTypeParam.Name
member.summary: Type parameter name, as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppValueTypeParam.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Forces specified type parameter to be treated as value type by translator.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppVirtualInheritance
member.summary: Forces virtual inheritance instead of direct for specific type.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppVirtualInheritance.BaseTypeFullName
member.summary: Name of type base to be inherited from virtually.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppVirtualInheritance.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Forces virtual inheritance instead of direct for specified type.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppWeakPtr
member.summary: Force holding value as weak pointer rather than shared pointer. Should only be used with fields, as other usage modes are obsolete.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppWeakPtr.TemplateArgN
member.summary: Index of template argument to be translated as weak reference. -1 means top level pointer.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppWeakPtr.#ctor
member.summary: Forces variable to hold weak pointer to attributed field instead of shared pointer.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppWeakPtr.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Forces switching collection to storing weak pointers instead of shared ones. Pass 0 to store weak pointers in List or to store weak pointers to Dictionary keys. Pass 1 to store weak pointers to Dictionary values, etc.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppWrapInMacroAttribute
member.summary: Forces translator to wrap method in macro.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppWrapInMacroAttribute.MacroCondition
member.summary: Macro condition to be passed to macro as passed to attribute constructor.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.CppWrapInMacroAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Wraps translated method into '#if <macroCondition> ... #endif' macro when translating.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.Translator
member.summary: API to query information stored by translator.

member.name: P:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.Translator.IsTranslated
member.summary: Returns true, if translated code is running, and false otherwise.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.MemoryManagement
member.summary: API to perform specific actions from ported code which are related to memory management.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.MemoryManagement.ObjectReferenceEqualityComparer
member.summary: Comparer that uses object references, ignoring any overrides.

member.name: T:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.MemoryManagement.ObjectsBag
member.summary: Container designed to extend objects lifetime.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.MemoryManagement.ObjectsBag.Add(System.Object)
member.summary: Adds object into container.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.MemoryManagement.ObjectsBag.Remove(System.Object)
member.summary: Removes object from container.
member.returns: True if object was found and deleted, false otherwise.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.MemoryManagement.ObjectsBag.Contains(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if object is present in the container.
member.returns: True if object is present in the container, false otherwise.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.MemoryManagement.ObjectsBag.Clear
member.summary: Deletes all objects in the container.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.MemoryManagement.BindLifetime``2(``0,``1)
member.summary: Creates a pointer to the object which controls lifetime of the object. This pointer's expiration is bound to expiration of the object, just like this of any other pointer that owns object. If converted to weak type, it is still consistent with other pointers to and does not expire while there is at least one shared pointer to object. Also, the returned pointer does not ensure that object is alive, so some other means (e. g. shared pointer stored in the object) should do so. Should be used in the situations where owns the , which effectively means that the will be kept alive by even if the returned aliasing pointer no longer exists. Otherwise, doesn't guarantee that the resulting pointer will remain valid, because if doesn't actually hold shared reference to , can be deleted any time as the resulting pointer only owns but not the .
member.remarks: This is low-level and error-prone function, use it with care.

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.MemoryManagement.ExtendLifetime``2(``0,``1)
member.summary: Creates a smart pointer using the aliasing constructor and copies and pointers to the "proxy" objects holder. Creates a pointer to the and extends the lifetime of all objects to the lifetime of this pointer. The resulting pointer guarantees all parameters to remain alive, even if it is the only pointer that keeps track of them. The resulting pointer effectively owns all objects passed to this method, however, it has its own expiration track. This means, that converting its own copy to weak type will expire it, even if all objects it tracks are still alive. Should be used in the situations when there are several unrelated (not holding shared references to each other) objects that should be guaranteed to remain alive together. The returned pointer will own a temporary objects that keeps all of them alive, and this lifetime extension stops working once the returned pointer no longer exists (or all of its copies become weak).

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.MemoryManagement.ExtendLifetime``3(``0,``1,``2)
member.summary: Creates a smart pointer using the aliasing constructor and copies , and pointers to the "proxy" objects holder. Creates a pointer to the and extends the lifetime of all objects to the lifetime of this pointer. The resulting pointer guarantees all parameters to remain alive, even if it is the only pointer that keeps track of them. The resulting pointer effectively owns all objects passed to this method, however, it has its own expiration track. This means, that converting its own copy to weak type will expire it, even if all objects it tracks are still alive. Should be used in the situations when there are several unrelated (not holding shared references to each other) objects that should be guaranteed to remain alive together. The returned pointer will own a temporary objects that keeps all of them alive, and this lifetime extension stops working once the returned pointer no longer exists (or all of its copies become weak).

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.MemoryManagement.ExtendLifetime``4(``0,``1,``2,``3)
member.summary: Creates a smart pointer using the aliasing constructor and copies , , and pointers to the "proxy" objects holder. Creates a pointer to the and extends the lifetime of all objects to the lifetime of this pointer. The resulting pointer guarantees all parameters to remain alive, even if it is the only pointer that keeps track of them. The resulting pointer effectively owns all objects passed to this method, however, it has its own expiration track. This means, that converting its own copy to weak type will expire it, even if all objects it tracks are still alive. Should be used in the situations when there are several unrelated (not holding shared references to each other) objects that should be guaranteed to remain alive together. The returned pointer will own a temporary objects that keeps all of them alive, and this lifetime extension stops working once the returned pointer no longer exists (or all of its copies become weak).

member.name: M:CodePorting.Translator.Cs2Cpp.MemoryManagement.ExtendLifetime``5(``0,``1,``2,``3,``4)
member.summary: Creates a smart pointer using the aliasing constructor and copies , , , and pointers to the "proxy" objects holder. Creates a pointer to the and extends the lifetime of all objects to the lifetime of this pointer. The resulting pointer guarantees all parameters to remain alive, even if it is the only pointer that keeps track of them. The resulting pointer effectively owns all objects passed to this method, however, it has its own expiration track. This means, that converting its own copy to weak type will expire it, even if all objects it tracks are still alive. Should be used in the situations when there are several unrelated (not holding shared references to each other) objects that should be guaranteed to remain alive together. The returned pointer will own a temporary objects that keeps all of them alive, and this lifetime extension stops working once the returned pointer no longer exists (or all of its copies become weak).
